LanguageData.Wolfein.LaunchDisabled: Can not launch: no enough fuel
LanguageData.Wolfein.RefuelShuttleDesc: Consume the combined fuel held by the caravan to replenish fuel.
LanguageData.Wolfein.RefuelShuttle_FullFuel: No need to refill: {0} is full
LanguageData.Wolfein.RebelRaidLetterTextPostfix_CorpH: To meet the overwhelming demands of the resistance cause, the Resistance Army has decided to requisition supplies from your colony—free of charge.
LanguageData.Wolfein.RebelRaidLetterTextPostfix_CorpN: To the Resistance Army, any faction that attempts to collaborate with the Megacorp faces only one outcome: elimination.
LanguageData.Wolfein.RequestDataResult: {0} has airdropped the supplies you requested.
LanguageData.Wolfein.RechargeEnergyShieldDesc: Consume one charge to immediately reset the current shield energy. \n\nCurrent remaining charges: {0}/{1}
LanguageData.Wolfein.TurretControlTip: Sets the turret types in the weapon system that are allowed to fire freely. Turrets that are disabled will not auto-attack, but can still fire at manually aimed targets.
